summary: Four of five shortlist candidates passed the frozen hard gate on a public-safe synthetic RAG source-text quality-review fixture. A was the lowest-token and fastest exact-shape pass. B preserved the safety boundary but failed the exact page status field shape by using a classification alias.
blocked_or_limited_measurements: No separate subagent runner usage telemetry was available; Codex CLI JSON telemetry is used as a proxy for quality and cost.
This calibration uses the repo-local five-profile quality-equivalence shortlist, not the full default matrix.
CLI stderr emitted local plugin warning paths and was intentionally not archived.
